campaign.description: How content is created, reviewed, and published about participating businesses

landing_page.ai_goal: Show the business owner they get content without writing it themselves

slides.title: The Content Problem

content.headline: You Know You Should Post More
content.visual: Empty content calendar with question marks

slides.narration: You know you should post more. Social media, blog posts, email newsletters, announcements—everyone says you need content. But who has the time? You're running a business. The content falls off. Then the visibility drops. It's a vicious cycle. What if there was another way?

slides.title: modern tools Writes. You Approve.

content.headline: The New Content Model

flow.action: modern tools drafts content based on your business

content.result: Consistent content without the time drain

slides.narration: Here's the new model. modern tools drafts content based on your business—you do nothing. You review it in two minutes—quick scan. Click approve or make quick edits—one click. Content publishes automatically—you do nothing. The result: consistent content without the time drain. You stay visible without becoming a full-time content creator.

slides.title: What your account team can Create

content.headline: modern tools Creates All Types of Content

slides.narration: your account team can create all types of content. Social posts—daily, two-minute review. Blog articles—weekly, five minutes to review. Email newsletters—weekly or monthly, five minutes. Announcements, event descriptions, service descriptions—as needed, quick review. The modern tools adapts to your voice, your business, your audience. You just approve or adjust.

slides.title: Consistency Beats Perfection
slides.narration: Here's the secret nobody tells you: consistency beats perfection. Two perfect posts per month reaches maybe two hundred people. The systems punishes inconsistency. Twenty good posts per month reaches two thousand people. The systems rewards consistency. Ten times the reach. Probably the same total effort. You don't need perfect content. You need present content.

slides.title: How the system learns Your Voice

content.headline: modern tools Sounds Like You (Not a Robot)

training.learns: What you like and don't like

content.result: Content that sounds authentically like your business

slides.narration: But does content creation sound robotic? Not anymore. the system learns your voice from your website—your terminology, services, approach. From past content—your tone and style. From your feedback—what you like and don't like. From industry context—what resonates in your field. After a few rounds of feedback, modern tools produces content that sounds authentically like your business. Not generic. Not robotic. Yours.

slides.title: The Business That Posts Every Day

case_study.after: Daily posts, 10 minutes/week total on content
case_study.quote: I finally feel like we have a real social media presence without hiring anyone.

slides.narration: Real example. A boutique fitness studio. Before: one to two posts a month, constantly stressed about content. After enabling content creation: daily posts, ten minutes per week total on content. Result: social following grew three hundred forty percent, inquiries up sixty-seven percent. The owner said: 'I finally feel like we have a real social media presence without hiring anyone.'

slides.title: Activate content creation

content.headline: Ready to Post Consistently Without the Work?

cta_secondary.label: Download: The Business That Posts Every Day

content.assurance: Try it free. Cancel anytime. Your voice, amplified.

slides.narration: Ready to post consistently without the work? Activate content creation now—try it free, cancel anytime. Or download the full story about the business that posts every day. Your voice, amplified. Your visibility, maintained. Your time, protected. Click activate and let's make content happen.

article.title: The Business That Posts Every Day (Without Trying)

email_1_educational.subject: We write about local businesses every day. Here's how yours can be featured.
email_1_educational.preview_text: Content about your business without the work
email_1_educational.body:
Hi [First Name],

We publish local business content in [Community Name] Day.News every day — articles, features, mentions, event coverage.

Your business can be part of this. Here's how the content process works:

→ We write about participating businesses as part of community news
→ You don't have to write anything — we handle it
→ You can review and approve before it publishes
→ Content stays live permanently and drives ongoing visibility

[SEE HOW CONTENT WORKS →]

One [Category] business in [similar community] went from zero local press coverage to monthly features. Their foot traffic increased measurably.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
